prompts.title: Chess board → winter evening (edit via `/v1/images/edits`) 🆕
prompts.prompt: Make it a winter evening with heavy snowfall, snow dusted on the board and pieces, breath vapor in the air, cold blue-grey lighting, chess position still clearly readable. Preserve the original chess-board composition and landscape aspect ratio exactly; keep the board and pieces aligned and readable.

prompts.title: Tea poster → metro lightbox mockup
prompts.prompt: Transform the provided tea poster into a realistic metro-station lightbox mockup while preserving the poster artwork and Chinese typography as much as possible. Show the poster behind glossy glass in a vertical illuminated advertising frame on a clean subway platform wall. Add subtle reflections, brushed metal frame, floor tiles, soft overhead transit lighting, and a few blurred commuters in the distance. Keep the poster straight, legible, and dominant; do not redesign the poster, do not change its main text, and do not add fake brand logos.
